why_model_failed: The model likely misinterpreted the irregular pigment network and asymmetric pigmentation as a benign atypical nevus rather than recognizing the malignant features.
key_feature: irregular pigment network with abrupt cutoff at periphery
rule_condition: asymmetric shape; irregular/atypical pigment network; multiple brown shades with darker eccentric focus; peripheral network disruption

why_model_failed: The model likely misinterpreted the irregular brown pigmentation and regression features as benign nevus patterns rather than recognizing the asymmetric pigment network and gray-white regression areas indicative of melanoma.
key_feature: asymmetric annular-granular pattern with peppering regression
rule_condition: irregular brown-gray granular pigmentation; white scar-like regression areas; asymmetric distribution of pigment; loss of typical nevus network

why_model_failed: The model likely interpreted the small size and relatively regular border as benign features, missing the subtle irregular pigment distribution and central regression.
key_feature: central hypopigmentation/regression with peripheral pigment remnants
rule_condition: small pigmented lesion with central clearing or gray-white regression; asymmetric peripheral pigment distribution; irregular brown pigment at margins

why_model_failed: The model likely interpreted the irregular pigmentation as benign nevus variation rather than recognizing the asymmetric distribution and multiple brown shades as melanoma features.
key_feature: irregular pigment network with multiple shades of brown and focal dark structureless areas
rule_condition: asymmetric pigment distribution; multiple brown hues present; irregular border with fading edges; focal dark globules or dots
